name: Adam Spanberger
subject: Abigail’s birthday Wednesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

In just a few days, we'll celebrate Abigail's birthday! As always, our girls and I are making her favorite dinner and a cake, but this year is a big one for Abigail. She's turning 40, and it would be awesome if we could get lots of signatures from her supporters. I'm planning to give her the card on Wednesday morning.

[_**Can you add your name to this card along with a short 'happy birthday' message?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0wnMNivtxoDB3FVyCLat5AX16-FGQ0BcLwoOBemUwo=/ej067UO9z4de_3GgeAdjiG4RUFCLNp41InTl4c58JZ4=)

Abigail works incredibly hard each day to serve the people of Central Virginia. It would mean a lot to her to hear from you on her big day! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0wnMNivtxoDB3FVyCLat5AX16-FGQ0BcLwoOBemUwo=/ej067UO9z4de_3GgeAdjiG4RUFCLNp41InTl4c58JZ4=)
Thanks!
Adam | | | [ SIGN THE CARD >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/H0wnMNivtxoDB3FVyCLat5AX16-FGQ0BcLwoOBemUwo=/ej067UO9z4de_3GgeAdjiG4RUFCLNp41InTl4c58JZ4=)

President Obama's election was an historic moment in American history. We're grateful to him every day for his eight years of service to this great nation as our Commander-in-Chief.
Barack Obama brought the US economy back from life support. He signed into law legislation holding Wall Street accountable. He helped to grant millions of Americans health care, and made sure they could never again be discriminated against for a pre-existing condition.
That's why we're sending 5,000 enthusiastic birthday wishes to our 44th president.[ _**Add your name to join us >>**_](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0703/72412298/4311eb00/6102c437/1544954505/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/happy-birthday-obama?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-++Add+your+name+to+join+us+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190804_HBDObama_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190804_HBDObama_U1_X1")

subject: Elizabeth Warren needs to know: Do you believe we are experiencing a climate crisis?
body:

According to climate scientists, we have one decade to prevent irreversible damage to our planet, and hundreds of millions of people could be displaced due to climate change.
That's why Warren is doing more than just talking about the climate crisis -- **She 's rolled out an aggressive plan to combat it.**
On her first day as President, Warren would IMMEDIATELY put a moratorium on any new fossil fuel leases on public lands -- which account for nearly a quarter of US greenhouse gas emissions.
Her plan would not only massively cut carbon emissions, it would make the United States a world leader on green technology and help bring back middle-class manufacturing jobs.
[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4767/4bd7760e/4a27c44c/77e6c5fc/190013680/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190804_WarrenDebate2_U3_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190804_WarrenDebate2_U3_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190804_WarrenDebate2_U3_X2")
**How would we pay for such an aggressive climate policy?**
Warren has a plan for that, too -- by forcing large corporations to pay their fair share in taxes, ending federal oil and gas subsidies, and closing tax loopholes that encourage companies to move good-paying jobs overseas.
[**So we want to know -- Do you agree with Elizabeth Warren that climate change is an existential threat that warrants an aggressive, robust response by our next President?**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4767/4bd7760e/4a27c44c/77e6c5fb/190013680/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190804_WarrenDebate2_U3_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+So+we+want+to+know++Do+you+agree+with+El&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190804_WarrenDebate2_U3_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190804_WarrenDebate2_U3_X2")

name: Dan Baer
subject: RE: "Moscow Mitch" McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
We can't let Mitch McConnell sabotage our future elections for his own -- and Donald Trump's -- personal gain.
|
---

| | I need your help:

[**As I type this, Mitch McConnell is blocking House Democrats ' critical election security legislation. I need 1,000 signatures on my emergency petition to stop him. If we get 1,000 names, I'll personally deliver this petition straight to Mitch McConnell. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ba/232dfd1/9dc885d/62a1221c/2312758715/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-election-security-petition?source=20190804_em_pet_b1_baer_all")

We all just watched Robert Mueller testify to the fact that Russia interfered in our election -- _and is continuing to attack us at this very second._

**But nevertheless, McConnell just blocked critical legislation that would protect our elections from foreign interference.**

I'm furious. I'm disgusted. And I refuse to let Moscow Mitch get away with this.

We can't let him sabotage our future elections for his own -- and Donald Trump's -- personal gain. We have to safeguard our elections from Russian interference.

[**I need a powerful surge of opposition on my petition to demand McConnell bring Democrats ' election security bills up for a vote in the Senate. Help me reach 1,000 signatures strong so I can deliver it straight to McConnell's door. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ba/232dfd1/9dc885d/62a1221c/2312758715/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/mcconnell-election-security-petition?source=20190804_em_pet_b1_baer_all")

Thanks, Dan

name: Kamala Harris
subject: No more thoughts and prayers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
_Content warning: this email contains references to gun violence and mass shootings that some readers may find upsetting._ Yesterday in El Paso, 20 people lost their lives at a shopping mall. It was a Saturday afternoon. They were killed by a man with an assault rifle, and it was over in minutes. And then, late last night, nine people were killed during a mass shooting at a bar in Dayton, Ohio, by a man wearing body armor, wielding what has been described as an “assault-style weapon.” The shooting lasted no more than 1 minute. This is life in America in 2019. People are killed by guns in schools, at festivals, at concerts, at places of worship, in malls, and at picnics -- everywhere people live their lives. El Paso was the 250th mass shooting in America _this year_ , and Dayton is 251. This doesn’t happen anywhere else. It happens in America because our so-called leaders lack the courage to act. And frankly, I’ve had enough. Have you? **As President, I will ask Congress to place comprehensive gun reform on my desk within 100 days. If they fail to act, I will take action. Here is what I will do:**
* I will revoke the licenses of gun manufacturers and dealers that break the law and take the most egregious offenders to court.

* I will mandate the most comprehensive background checks in history by requiring anyone who sells more than five guns in a year to run a background check on all gun sales.

* And I will ban the importation of AR-15-style assault weapons into the United States.

These are actions well within the powers of the presidency. And I will take them. This is a public health emergency that needs to be addressed. **[No more thoughts and prayers. We need action. If you’re with me, split a contribution to Giffords, the Brady Campaign to Prevent Gun Violence, and Moms Demand Action for Gun Sense in America»](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190804-gunsafety?refcode=ema190804-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&t=1&refcode2=5873_5755789_H4qorl&akid=5873%2E5755789%2EH4qorl)** | | [ DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190804-gunsafety?refcode=ema190804-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&t=2&refcode2=5873_5755789_H4qorl&akid=5873%2E5755789%2EH4qorl)
---
Thank you for adding your voice to this fight. We can’t accept this as normal in America. We have to act, and we have to act now.
For the People,
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---

name: Cory Booker
subject: We cannot continue to live in this reality
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, over the past twenty-four hours, we have lost at least 29 Americans to mass shootings. More than 50 people are injured, and countless more will suffer from the trauma of these events for years to come. **Let me be clear: Donald Trump is giving license to violence. He 's responsible.** Because his racism and bigotry directly inspires white supremacists who carry out attacks like the one we saw yesterday in El Paso. Because he hasn't moved a finger to rid our streets of weapons of war. Because he blames everything but the easy access to guns for people who have no business possessing them. Because when these shootings occur, he and other Republicans like Texas Governor Greg Abbott tell us that it is time "to focus more on memorials before we start the politics." We don't have time for that. Before we're even done mourning one shooting, the next one occurs. We saw that overnight. I was in church last night -- and one of the lessons in my faith is that you reap what you sow. When Donald Trump uses words like "infestation" and "invasion" and "shithole countries" and tells congresswomen of color to "go back" to where they came from, when he refuses to condemn neo-Nazis and calls them "very fine people" after they run over a woman with a car -- he is giving license to this kind of violence. **He is sowing the seeds of white supremacy. He is sowing the seeds of violence. He is engaging in politics that leads directly to the stream of violence we are witnessing.** **We cannot continue to live in this reality.** There are so many steps we can take to end this uniquely American problem. We can ban the weapon of war the El Paso and Dayton shooters used, as my plan would do. We can require federal licensing for everyone who wants to buy and possess a gun, because if you need a license to drive a car, you should need one to get your hands on a gun too. We need moral clarity and healing and love in our nation. name: Robert Foster
subject: How you can help 🗳
body:
Before Tuesday
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KEBAgZOw0K0icBGLe1Wcs2RIPoXS272G0NEcaU-WaGnh7AJXG-ggoSdrNArbCeskkisIflWus6pozrhZltUKkgWC9AENiiERg0NFcZJTqDM-Vv_KUfI7NHb_8o2XNufr6c8XJLTvEvNY9_isSW5nD_8BKibit7Y51uDnsodBe_6c-lyu3EXKPoDRzUXmVzpILTEDfTpkl3VGkV4lvzeDK2kL81F5HqyL&c=zXY9-yT_VONNLLxNaXDAVvrMz-UlbUJVkKaR59ahQg8jMknQrUNfIw==&ch=M6f5w6Smc5Pj-kVQH4iha-TT78DCI4S7OOMZakhbd5nlhT3R1mUqkw==)
---
| |
---
| We're closing in on Election Day and the momentum continues to build. Heather and I wanted to share a few things that you can do to help us finish strong on Tuesday.
1\. Text and Make Calls to your family and friends. Making calls or texting is one of the most important parts of reaching out to voters and encouraging them to support Robert. It's something you can do from home, and any amount of time is helpful.
2\. Post a Personal Message on Social Media Having your support on social media will help encourage your friends & family to find out more about our campaign and help spread our message. Be sure to use #TeamFoster on your posts.
3\. Contribute Financially As I'm sure you know, running a statewide campaign is expensive. It's been incredible to see the financial support from across the country when we made national headlines two weeks ago. If you are able to help us finish strong financially, [please donate here.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KEBAgZOw0K0icBGLe1Wcs2RIPoXS272G0NEcaU-WaGnh7AJXG-ggoSdrNArbCeskkisIflWus6pozrhZltUKkgWC9AENiiERg0NFcZJTqDM-Vv_KUfI7NHb_8o2XNufr6c8XJLTvEvNY9_isSW5nD_8BKibit7Y51uDnsodBe_6c-lyu3EXKPoDRzUXmVzpILTEDfTpkl3VGkV4lvzeDK2kL81F5HqyL&c=zXY9-yT_VONNLLxNaXDAVvrMz-UlbUJVkKaR59ahQg8jMknQrUNfIw==&ch=M6f5w6Smc5Pj-kVQH4iha-TT78DCI4S7OOMZakhbd5nlhT3R1mUqkw==)
4\. Tell your neighborhood and co-workers We've traveled all across this great state the last 9 months, but I haven't been able to be everywhere. You can help us by campaigning to your neighbors and/or co-workers and letting them know to vote Tuesday for #TeamFoster.
5\. Continue to Pray for Us As a man who puts his faith in Christ, I know the power of prayer. Heather and I covet your prayers as we continue to spread our message before Tuesday. Please continue to pray that Heather and I will continue to seek and find the Lord's understanding and that his will be done in all we do.
6\. Work your voting precinct Tuesday We are out of signs (which is a good sign), but we still need help from volunteers who would be willing to work their local voting precinct during the morning (7-8), Lunch, and afternoon. You can use your yard sign at the precinct, since we are out.
Heather and I are beyond grateful for the warm welcome you have shown us since we started this campaign nine months ago - my biggest challenge yet. Like so many of you, we love Mississippi and believe, with my vision and your help, we can make our state an even better place to live, start a business, hire an employee, and call home.
---
| Thank you for following us on this journey,
Robert
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Tell McConnell it's time to act now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend -

To go to bed mourning one mass shooting and then wake up to news of another -- this isn't the America I grew up in, but it is sadly the reality for my three daughters and kids nationwide.

Today, they awoke to the news that 29 lives were stolen from us in two horrific acts of mass gun violence in the past 24 hours alone. On top of that, there are dozens more of our friends and neighbors who have been injured, are mourning the loss of a loved one, or are reckoning with their community being ripped apart.

This is not the world our kids deserve.

I come from a state where we've now had 20 years of gun violence, starting with Columbine, which happened just before my first daughter was born.

All three of my daughters have grown up in the shadow of this violence that my generation didn't -- scared to go to school, to a movie theatre, or to a community event, because of what now happens too often in the United States of America.

It's not just the kind of mass shootings that we commonly think of, but it's the kind of violence that goes on every single day in neighborhoods across America.

We cannot sit idly by. There are commonsense solutions that the vast majority of Americans support that would make a real difference. We have to demand action and hold our leaders accountable at the ballot box if they fail.

[**So today, I am calling on Mitch McConnell to bring the Senate back in session this week to vote on commonsense gun safety legislation. We need to keep our communities safe. Sign my petition if you agree Congress must act immediately to say enough is enough.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbace3/134673f2/e7736f1/69967aef/1283753890/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/Demand-Action?source=EM_PET_B1_080419_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

America's kids have a job: it's to go to school, to learn, and to explore. It's not their job to keep weapons of war out of our communities, or to pass background checks to make sure people with no business having guns don't have them. That's our job.

[**Add your name if you agree we have to act now and chip in today to support gun safety groups like Gabby Giffords' organization, which are fighting every day to keep our kids safe.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbace3/134673f2/e7736f1/69967aef/1283753890/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/Demand-Action?source=EM_PET_B1_080419_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

-Michael
